message:
chore: update .beads/.gitignore for local state and merge artifacts

- Add .local_version pattern
- Add daemon-*.log.gz pattern
- Add merge artifact patterns (beads.*.jsonl/meta.json)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -18,3 +18,17 @@ bd.db
 !*.jsonl
 !metadata.json
 !config.json
+
+# Local version tracking
+.local_version
+
+# Compressed daemon logs
+daemon-*.log.gz
+
+# Merge artifacts
+beads.base.jsonl
+beads.base.meta.json
+beads.left.jsonl
+beads.left.meta.json
+beads.right.jsonl
+beads.right.meta.json
